slimeRngCodes.title: Slime RNG Codes
slimeRngCodes.intro: Redeem Slime RNG codes after the short tutorial, then use the rewards during longer roll sessions for faster slime collection, better luck windows, and stronger early progress.

workingCodes.bestFor: Extra rolling value and faster early progression

workingCodes.reward: Ultra Luck Boost, Roll Speed Boost, and 4 Apples
workingCodes.bestFor: Luck farming, roll speed, and slime XP

workingCodes.reward: Luck Boost, Roll Speed Boost, and 6 Apples
workingCodes.bestFor: Stacking boosts before a longer rolling session

redeemSteps.title: Launch Slime RNG
redeemSteps.description: Open the Slime RNG Roblox experience and finish the short tutorial.

redeemSteps.title: Open the Shop
redeemSteps.description: Select the Shop button on the right side of the screen.

redeemSteps.title: Find the code box
redeemSteps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the Shop menu and locate the code entry field.

redeemSteps.title: Enter and redeem
redeemSteps.description: Type the Slime RNG code exactly as shown, then press Redeem to claim the reward.

tips: Slime RNG codes are case-sensitive, so copy capital letters and punctuation exactly.
Use roll speed and luck rewards when you can stay active for a longer session.
Slime RNG codes belong to this Roblox experience and are separate from other slime-themed games.

slimeRngBeginnerGuide.title: Slime RNG Beginner Guide
slimeRngBeginnerGuide.intro: Slime RNG starts with rolling, equipping, fighting, earning Coins, and buying upgrades in a clear order. The strongest beginner path is to automate rolls, improve roll speed, unlock zones, scale enemy count, and prepare for Goop before your first rebirth.

steps.title: Roll your first slimes
steps.description: Roll a few Slime RNG slimes and equip the best units you get so your team can defeat enemies and start earning Coins.

steps.title: Look for Fin early
steps.description: Fin is a standout early Slime RNG damage option and should be leveled before weaker starter slimes.

steps.title: Buy Auto Roll for 200 Coins
steps.goal: Remove manual rolling from the main loop.
steps.description: Auto Roll keeps the Slime RNG rolling loop active and is the first major quality-of-life purchase.

steps.title: Upgrade Roll Speed
steps.description: Roll Speed improves how often you can roll, which makes every Slime RNG boost window more valuable.

steps.title: Unlock the next zone
steps.description: Move into stronger Slime RNG zones once your team can keep pace instead of over-farming the starting area.

steps.title: Prioritize Enemy Count
steps.description: Enemy Count is a major Slime RNG upgrade because more enemies means more kills and more Coins when your team has enough damage.

steps.title: Feed fruits to your best slimes
steps.goal: Turn Apples and other fruit into useful power.
steps.description: Put Slime RNG fruit rewards into your strongest slimes instead of spreading XP across weak units.

steps.title: Reach 10,000,000 Coins for Goop
steps.description: Goop unlocks after a 10,000,000 Coin investment and becomes the Slime RNG bridge into rebirth growth.

steps.title: Rebirth when ready
steps.description: Slime RNG rebirths reset Coins and zone access while keeping major long-term progress such as slimes, consumables, upgrades, and luck gains.

steps.title: Join the Stouts Studio group
steps.description: Joining the Stouts Studio Roblox group gives Slime RNG players a permanent +1 Luck bonus.

quickTips: Buy Slime RNG Auto Roll before chasing expensive luck upgrades.
Roll Speed improves every code reward that boosts rolling sessions.
Keep your best Slime RNG damage dealer leveled so new zones feel smooth.
Save long boost windows for sessions where you can roll and fight actively.

slimeRngTierList.title: Slime RNG Tier List
slimeRngTierList.intro: The Slime RNG tier list ranks slimes by practical value, damage, speed, utility, and progression impact. Void Slime is the ultimate chase target, Huge variants dominate late-game play, Orca and Lucky Slime carry mid-game farming, and Fin is the best early damage target.

slimes.name: Void Slime
slimes.notes: The top long-term Slime RNG collection and combat goal.

tiers.summary: Late-game Slime RNG meta tier built around Huge variants and valuable utility.

slimes.name: Huge Spike
slimes.notes: One of the highest DPS Slime RNG targets with piercing attacks.

slimes.name: Huge Rocky
slimes.notes: A massive Slime RNG area-damage option for late-game zone pushing.

slimes.name: Huge Lucky
slimes.notes: A premier Slime RNG luck support pick for rare slime hunting.

tiers.summary: Strong Slime RNG mid-game tier for stable farming teams.

slimes.name: Orca
slimes.notes: Excellent Slime RNG DPS once your early team is ready to scale.

slimes.name: Lucky Slime
slimes.notes: A Slime RNG support unit for rare-drop farming and long roll sessions.

tiers.summary: Useful Slime RNG early-to-mid game slimes that bridge progression.

slimes.name: Spike
slimes.notes: A fast Slime RNG attacker for early combat and enemy clearing.

slimes.name: Fin
slimes.notes: The best early Slime RNG DPS target and a smart first slime to level.

slimes.notes: A sturdy Slime RNG option when survivability matters.

slimeRngSlimeCollection.title: Slime RNG Slime Collection
slimeRngSlimeCollection.intro: Slime RNG collection is about rolling, equipping, leveling, and replacing slimes as your account grows. Use this database to decide which Slime RNG slimes are worth keeping, feeding, and building around.

slimes.name: Fin
slimes.description: The best Slime RNG early damage dealer and a smart first leveling target.
slimes.recommendedUse: Level early and use as your first reliable DPS slime.

slimes.name: Basic Slime
slimes.description: The standard Slime RNG starter slime with low individual power and easy availability.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use until better early-game slimes appear.

slimes.name: Green Slime
slimes.description: A balanced Slime RNG slime with a mix of damage and health.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use as a temporary team filler before stronger DPS or utility slimes.

slimes.name: Rocky
slimes.description: A sturdy Slime RNG slime with higher health and slower damage output.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use in defensive setups when survivability matters.

slimes.name: Spike
slimes.description: A sharp Slime RNG attacker with higher damage and faster attacks than basic slimes.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use for faster enemy clearing before rare and Huge slimes take over.

slimes.name: Water Slime
slimes.description: A flexible Slime RNG slime with moderate stats.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use as an early-game slot when your team needs stable options.

slimes.name: Fire Slime
slimes.description: A fiery Slime RNG slime that adds burn-style pressure.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use when longer fights benefit from extra damage over time.

slimes.name: Ice Slime
slimes.description: A Slime RNG utility slime that slows enemy momentum.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use when control is more useful than raw damage.

slimes.name: Orca
slimes.description: A powerful Slime RNG mid-game slime with excellent carry value.
slimes.recommendedUse: Prioritize leveling once obtained because it can carry progression.

slimes.name: Lucky Slime
slimes.description: A rare Slime RNG slime built around luck support.
slimes.recommendedUse: Equip during rare farming and longer roll sessions.

slimes.name: Huge Rocky
slimes.description: An enormous Slime RNG Rocky variant with strong area damage.
slimes.recommendedUse: Keep as a late-game anchor for farming and zone pushing.

slimes.name: Huge Spike
slimes.description: A colossal Slime RNG Spike variant with high damage and piercing attacks.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use as one of the strongest damage-focused Huge variant targets.

slimes.name: Huge Lucky
slimes.description: A top Slime RNG luck booster for rare slime hunting.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use during rare-hunting sessions and late-game collection goals.

slimes.name: Void Slime
slimes.description: The ultimate Slime RNG chase slime with unmatched long-term value.
slimes.recommendedUse: Treat as the ultimate collection goal.

collectionTips: Feed Slime RNG fruit rewards to the slimes you actually use.
Keep luck-focused Slime RNG units ready for rare-hunting sessions.
Replace starter slimes once your rare or Huge variants can carry fights.

faq.title: Slime RNG FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick Slime RNG answers for codes, slimes, luck, zones, and rebirth progress.

questions.question: What is Slime RNG?
questions.answer: Slime RNG is a Roblox RNG collector where players roll for slimes, equip a team, defeat enemy slimes, earn Coins, buy upgrades, unlock zones, and rebirth for permanent growth.

questions.question: How do Slime RNG codes work?
questions.answer: Slime RNG codes are redeemed inside the Shop code box and can grant rewards such as Coins, dice, potions, Apples, Luck boosts, and Roll Speed boosts.

questions.question: What should Slime RNG beginners buy first?
questions.answer: Slime RNG beginners should buy Auto Roll, improve Roll Speed, unlock the next zone when ready, and scale Enemy Count once their team can defeat enemies quickly.

questions.question: Who is the best early Slime RNG slime?
questions.answer: Fin is the strongest early Slime RNG target because it gives dependable starter damage and helps new players clear enemies faster.

questions.question: Why does Slime RNG rebirth matter?
questions.answer: Slime RNG rebirth converts progression into long-term multiplier gains, making later runs faster while preserving important account progress.
